---
title: "Full Stack"
subtitle: "live projects and web builds"
---

This section highlights a couple of the web projects I have built and shared publicly. They combine product thinking, applied AI, and end-to-end implementation in a way that feels practical and user-focused.

::: {.project-tile-grid}
::: {.project-tile}
<span class="project-tile-tag">Prototype AI App</span>

## Advisor Chat

Created a prototype AI chatbot that utilizes the Gemini embedding model alongside retrieval augmented generation to potentially provide accurate information to international students applying to BYUI.

::: {.project-tile-actions}
[Open Project](https://alcuinabraham.com/advisor-chat/){.project-tile-button target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::

::: {.project-tile}
<span class="project-tile-tag">Semester Project</span>

## Accent Scoring

Developed an accent detection scoring website through Microsoft Azure API to network with the founder of onlinejobs.ph, an outsourcing website home to 2M+ Filipino workers.

::: {.project-tile-actions}
[Open Project](https://alcuinabraham.com/Accent_Scoring/){.project-tile-button target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
:::
:::
:::
